CVE-2023-45684.title: Northern.tech CFEngine Enterprise before 3.21.3 allows SQL Inject ...
CVE-2023-45684.description: Northern.tech CFEngine Enterprise before 3.21.3 allows SQL Injection. The fixed versions are 3.18.6 and 3.21.3. The earliest affected version is 3.6.0. The issue is in the Mission Portal login page in the CFEngine hub.
